emails.subject: BHP Copper
emails.body: Kim I have spoken to Stacy Dickson about what needs to happen with the whole "Australian parent/US subsidiary" guaranty issue. I haven't heard back yet. Attached is the BHP Copper master physical. It's in PDF format, so they'll need Adobe Acrobat to view. Jay

emails.subject: BHP Copper
emails.body: Kim Just heard from Stacy Dickson on BHP Copper. There is no special requirement for the guaranty just because the parent is Australian. Attached is the required format. Let's try to get a $2 MM guaranty to cover the $1 MM+ exposure. PLEASE ASK YOUR BHP CONTACT TO VERIFY THAT BHP BILLITON LTD IS INDEED THE CORRECT NAME OF THE GUARANTOR. THIS IS CRITICAL. I went to the BHP website, but I couldn't tell if BHP Billiton Ltd. is a legal entity name or just a "doing business as" name. Thanks, Jay

emails.subject: BHP copper
emails.body: BHP copper J., BHP is still in the market for Balance august San Juan. Can we do this or can you call that guy that spiro recommended ASAP? Please let me know. thanks, Kim
